meta.name: Portfolio Aggregate Analytics Dashboard
meta.description: Adds a portfolio-level analytics section to the /live dashboard: per-coin performance ranking table, equity allocation donut chart, drawdown area chart, and aggregate risk KPIs (Sharpe, Sortino, Max DD, Calmar). All computed server-side from existing Supabase tables, zero new dependencies.

motivation.problem: The /live dashboard shows individual portfolio cards and a combined equity chart, but there is no portfolio-level analytics view. You cannot answer: 'Which coin is underperforming?', 'How is my capital allocated right now?', 'What is the portfolio-wide drawdown?', 'What is the aggregate Sharpe ratio?'
motivation.value: This is critical for monitoring a 5-coin forward test. Without aggregate analytics, you are flying blind on risk. With 3 days of data already accumulated, the basics (allocation, ranking, drawdown) are immediately useful. Risk metrics (Sharpe, Sortino) will become meaningful as data grows.
motivation.audience: Strategy owner reviewing forward test performance daily.

spec.description: Computes portfolio-level analytics from live_portfolios + live_equity_snapshots. No new DB tables needed.

ranking.description: Array of per-coin objects, sorted by return % descending

item.tradeCount: number — count from live_trades for this symbol
item.winRate: number | null — wins / total for this symbol
item.maxDrawdownPct: number — max drawdown_pct from equity snapshots for this symbol
item.currentDrawdownPct: number — latest drawdown_pct from equity snapshots

allocation.items: Array of { symbol: string, equity: number, pct: number (equity / totalEquity * 100) }

aggregate.portfolioMaxDrawdownPct: number — max combined drawdown across all snapshots at same timestamp
aggregate.sharpeRatio: number | null — computed from hourly portfolio returns, null if < 24 snapshots
aggregate.sortinoRatio: number | null — same, using downside deviation only
aggregate.calmarRatio: number | null — annualized return / max drawdown

drawdownSeries.description: Time series for aggregate drawdown chart
drawdownSeries.items: Array of { ts: number (ms epoch), drawdownPct: number (combined portfolio DD at that timestamp) }
drawdownSeries.note: Compute by grouping equity snapshots by ts, summing equity across all symbols at each timestamp, then computing running max and drawdown from the combined equity series

ranking_and_allocation: Query live_portfolios for all active symbols
Query live_trades grouped by symbol: SELECT symbol, count(*) as trade_count, count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) as win_count FROM live_trades GROUP BY symbol
Query live_equity_snapshots: for each symbol, get max(drawdown_pct) and latest drawdown_pct
Combine into ranking array, sort by returnPct desc, assign rank
aggregate_risk_metrics: Query ALL equity snapshots ordered by ts
Group by ts (timestamp) — sum equities across all symbols at each hour
Compute hourly returns: r[i] = (equity[i] - equity[i-1]) / equity[i-1]
Sharpe = mean(returns) / std(returns) * sqrt(8760) — annualized, 8760 hours/year
Sortino = mean(returns) / downside_std(returns) * sqrt(8760) — only negative returns for std
Combined max drawdown: running_max of combinedEquity, DD = (equity - peak) / peak * 100
Return null for Sharpe/Sortino if fewer than 24 data points (1 day)
drawdown_series: Same combined equity series from above
For each timestamp: drawdownPct = (combinedEquity - runningMax) / runningMax * 100
Return as array for charting (max 2000 points, downsample if needed)

spec.supabase_client: createClient with anon key (public RLS read)
spec.error_handling: Return { error, detail } with 500 status on DB failure. Return partial data if some queries fail.

props.ranking: Array of ranking items from /api/live/aggregate (see step 1)

spec.layout: Responsive table inside a rounded-xl bordered card. Title at top-left.

columns.label: dict.table.rank
columns.content: #1, #2, etc. — bold gold for #1, silver for #2, bronze for #3

columns.label: dict.table.status
columns.content: Green dot if hasOpenTrade, gray 'Idle' text otherwise

features: Row highlight: subtle bg-emerald-500/5 for #1 performer
Responsive: on mobile (< sm), hide unrealized, maxDD, status columns
Empty state: should not happen (always 5 coins), but handle gracefully
spec.styling: Match existing dark theme. font-mono tabular-nums for numbers. var(--color-border), var(--color-surface).

props.allocation: Array of { symbol, equity, pct } from /api/live/aggregate
props.title: string — i18n title

spec.implementation: Recharts PieChart donut (same pattern as LiveExitReasons.tsx / ExitReasons.tsx). innerRadius=60, outerRadius=100, paddingAngle=2.
spec.center_label: Total equity amount (fmtCompact) centered inside the donut
spec.legend: Grid below chart: colored dot + symbol (without USDT) + pct% + equity amount. One row per coin.
spec.null_handling: If allocation is empty or null, show 'No data' centered.
spec.sizing: Max width 320px, centered in its grid cell.

steps.title: Component: PortfolioDrawdown — combined drawdown area chart

props.series: Array of { ts: number, drawdownPct: number } from /api/live/aggregate
props.title: string — i18n title

spec.implementation: Recharts AreaChart with single red-gradient fill.

chart_config.area_fill: linear gradient from red-500/30 (top) to transparent (bottom)
chart_config.xAxis: timestamp formatted as MMM DD (fmtDate helper), tick every ~24h
chart_config.yAxis: drawdown % (inverted, negative values → show as positive with minus sign), domain auto
chart_config.reference_line: dashed horizontal line at y=0 (no drawdown baseline)

spec.empty_state: If series is empty or < 2 points, show message: 'Drawdown data accumulating...'
spec.note: Drawdown values are negative (e.g., -2.5%). Display as '-2.5%' in tooltip. The chart area should fill downward from 0.

spec.layout: Horizontal grid of 6 mini KPI cards (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6). Same card style as MiniKpi in live/page.tsx.
spec.null_handling: If aggregate is null, show 6 skeleton cards (animate-pulse bg-[var(--color-surface)] rounded-lg h-16).

steps.title: Orchestrator: PortfolioAggregate — fetches data, renders children

spec.description: Container component that fetches /api/live/aggregate and passes data to children. Manages loading/error state.

data_fetching.visibility_check: Skip fetch when tab is backgrounded (same pattern as live/page.tsx)

layout: Section title: dict.live.portfolioAnalytics.title — styled like the existing 'Trade History' heading in LiveTradeAnalytics
spec.loading_state: Skeleton placeholders matching each child component's layout
spec.error_state: Red bordered card with error message, same style as live/page.tsx error display

steps.title: Wire PortfolioAggregate into /live page
changes: Add <PortfolioAggregate /> between the equity chart (<LiveEquityChart />) and the open positions strip (<OpenPositionsStrip />)
No props needed — PortfolioAggregate manages its own data fetching
steps.placement: After line 164 (LiveEquityChart), before line 167 (OpenPositionsStrip). Add a mt-6 wrapper div for spacing.

steps.title: i18n: add portfolioAnalytics keys to all 10 dictionaries
steps.location: Inside the 'live' object, after the 'tradeAnalytics' block (before the closing brace of 'live')
steps.note: For the other 8 languages (de, es, fr, ja, ko, pt, ru, zh), translate the natural-language strings. Keep technical terms (Sharpe, Sortino, Max DD, Win Rate, P&L, Drawdown, Coin) in English per project translation policy.

manual_checks: Open /live locally — Portfolio Analytics section appears between equity chart and open positions
6 risk KPI cards render (values may show '—' for Sharpe/Sortino if < 24 hours of data)
Per-coin ranking table shows 5 rows sorted by return %, with rank medals
Allocation donut chart shows 5 slices with correct coin colors
Drawdown chart renders (may show flat line at 0% if no drawdown yet)
Switch language to Turkish — all labels translate correctly
Responsive: check mobile layout (table hides some columns, charts stack vertically)
30s after page load: data should auto-refresh without page reload

constraints: No new npm dependencies — recharts and lucide-react already installed
No new database tables or migrations — compute everything from existing live_portfolios, live_trades, live_equity_snapshots
Reuse existing format utilities (fmtUsd, fmtPct, fmtNum, fmtCompact, fmtDate) from src/lib/utils/format.ts
Follow existing dark theme: var(--color-border), var(--color-surface), var(--color-muted), var(--color-bg)
All user-facing strings via i18n dictionary — no hardcoded English in components
Technical terms (Sharpe, Sortino, Drawdown, P&L, Win Rate) stay in English across all languages
Supabase reads use anon key (public RLS)
Sharpe/Sortino return null (display '—') if fewer than 24 equity snapshots — avoid meaningless metrics
PortfolioAggregate fetches independently from the main /api/live call — do not couple them
Skeleton loading states for all components — never show blank or broken layout while loading
